text:
was an puzzle RPG game created by Neos Corporation, based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. It was released on Android and iOS based smartphones on 29 November 2013.

Overview

Puzzle RPG "Puzzle Buster" is a smartphone game app where you control puzzle pieces together with EVA characters to destroy the Angels! When you line up three or more puzzle pieces of the same color vertically or horizontally, cards of the same color as the puzzle pieces will attack the Angels! Connect combos to attack all at once!

Matching three cards and puzzle pieces of the same color vertically will also trigger an attack! You can also move cards horizontally! Use chained card manipulation to earn combos! Matching cards and puzzle pieces of the same color vertically to erase them will increase your attack power with a sync effect. Master the puzzle controls and protect the city from the apostles with your own hands!

Contains over 150 cards. The super rare illustrated cards have high stats! Collect and develop your favorite cards to create your own ultimate deck! https://web.archive.org/web/20240714111642/https://www.mediamagic.co.jp/mmapp_top/puzzlebuster
